global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: New open-source framework forcing AI coding agents through structured phases (constitution/rules, specify/requirements, clarify/questions, plan/architecture, tasks/breakdown, implement) before writing code. Reduces bugs, inconsistencies, and unpredictability in agent-driven development; compatible with Claude Code, Cursor, Copilot, etc. Quickly reached 95K stars.
